basics.name: Olivia Muehlberg
basics.label: Candidate for M.S. Business Analytics | B.S. Data Analytics
basics.summary: I’m an MS Business Analytics student and data analyst with experience building predictive models, conducting research, and developing analytics tools for sports applications. I’m interested in using data to improve decision-making across performance, operations, and business strategy.
